evals.prompt: Scrape https://example.com/pricing and get me the content in markdown format, skip the navigation and footer
evals.expected_output: Uses scrape_url with formats=['markdown'], excludeTags or onlyMainContent
expectations: Uses scrape_url tool (not crawl or batch)
Excludes nav/footer via excludeTags or onlyMainContent=true

evals.prompt: I need to scrape a page that loads content dynamically with JavaScript. The product list appears after a few seconds at https://shop.example.com/products
evals.expected_output: Uses scrape_url with waitFor parameter for dynamic content
expectations: Includes waitFor parameter with a CSS selector
Mentions that dynamic/JS pages need wait strategies
May suggest mobile rendering as fallback
